summary: Created 22 chapter-level outlines specifying POV character, scene goals, conflict, emotional arcs, and fantasy/romance beat assignments for all chapters. Chapters 1-11 include detailed scene breakdowns with five commandments structure. Chapters 12-22 include structural scaffolding for scene-beat-designer to refine. All outlines follow POV alternation (Kaelith/Lirien), track tension levels from tension-map, and map beats from dual-arc-timeline. Ready for scene-beat-designer refinement.
keyDecisions: POV alternation between Kaelith (CHAR-001) and Lirien (CHAR-002) follows dramatic need rather than rigid pattern — switches motivated by narrative purpose
Chapters 1-11 fully detailed with scene breakdowns using five commandments structure (inciting incident, complication, crisis, climax, resolution)
Chapters 12-22 provide structural scaffolding with beat assignments, intended for scene-beat-designer to add granular scene detail
Each chapter specifies target word count (4000-4100 alternating), tension level from tension-map, primary locations, and characters present
Fantasy and romance beats from dual-arc-timeline mapped to each chapter, ensuring neither arc goes silent
Hook and close types specified for each chapter to ensure pacing variety per INV-060/T22
Emotional arcs track POV character's state change through the chapter, with pivot moments identified
notes: All 22 chapter outlines created and ready for scene-beat-designer refinement. Chapters alternate POV between Kaelith and Lirien, with transitions motivated by narrative need. Early chapters (1-11) include detailed scene breakdowns; later chapters (12-22) provide structural scaffolding for scene-beat-designer to complete. All outlines conform to schema requirements and include upstream refs.
